docs.name: Radial Menu
docs.description: Circular flyout menu that bursts items outward from a center trigger with staggered spring animation.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of item configurations representing the burst actions.

props.name: radius
props.description: Distance in pixels each item travels from the trigger center.

props.name: startAngle
props.description: The starting angle for the radial arc (e.g. -90 for top).

props.name: endAngle
props.description: The concluding angle for the radial arc.

props.name: staggerDelay
props.description: Staggering time multiplier between cascading children.

docs.overview: RadialMenu bursts a configurable set of action buttons outward from a central trigger in an arc or full circle, using spring-animated entry and exit. Closes on outside click.

scenarios.title: Quick action toolbar
scenarios.description: Provide fast access to common actions without consuming screen real estate when the menu is closed.

scenarios.title: Canvas drawing tool picker
scenarios.description: Expand a top-half arc above the trigger so the menu does not overlap a canvas drawing surface.
